title: CreatureToss
description: Ever wanted to yeet a creeper across a ravine?
body:
# 🦘 CreatureToss – *Pick it up. Stack it. Yeet it.*

> Bring chaos and fun to your Minecraft server – one mob at a time.

---

## 💡 What is CreatureToss?

**CreatureToss** is a lightweight, fun, and slightly chaotic plugin that allows players to:

- 🐷 **Grab mobs**
- 🐮 **Stack them on top of each other**
- 🚀 **Yeet them across the world**

Players simply **sneak + right-click** a mob to pick it up, then **sneak + left-click** air to launch it forward.  
Perfect for survival servers, minigames, roleplay, or just good old Minecraft silliness.

---

## 🕹️ How to Use

| Action                          | Result                                  |
|--------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| Sneak + Right-Click mob        | Pick up the mob as a passenger          |
| Sneak + Right-Click block      | Place the top mob on the block          |
| Sneak + Left-Click air         | Launch the top mob in front of you      |

---

## ⚙️ Permissions


```
animal.use:
  default: true
  description: Allows a player to grab and toss mobs
```


---

## 🚫 Default Blacklist

These entities cannot be picked up or thrown:

- `ENDER_DRAGON`
- `PLAYER`

> More entity types can be added manually to the blacklist in the plugin.

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the plugin `.jar` file
2. Drop it into your `plugins/` folder
3. Restart your server
4. ✅ Done!

---

## 😄 Examples

- Stack a cow on a pig on a sheep — on **yourself**
- Throw a creeper off a cliff before it explodes 💣
- Relocate villagers in *style*
- Make a **slime cannon**. Why not?

---

## 📢 Want More?

Suggestions, issues, or pull requests are welcome!  
This plugin is part of the **[ModnCore](https://modncore.com)** family.
